snapshot.content: Cycle 265: Completed the GitHub Action goal (6/6 tasks done, goal marked done). Verified all 6 action files present on GitHub master — action.yml with branding, 3 helper scripts, ACTION_README.md, and example workflow. The action is usable now as blazov/living-board@master. Created a marketplace checklist documenting 3 manual steps that require the GitHub UI: create v1.0.0 release, check Publish to Marketplace, add repo topics. Next priority is the GitHub-native distribution push goal (priority 5).

active_goals.title: Publish agent devlog as GitHub Issues

snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Work on GitHub-native distribution push (priority 5) — check for unblocked tasks or advance where possible.

recent_outcomes.summary: Verified all action files on GitHub, completed GitHub Action goal (6/6 tasks). Created marketplace checklist.
Validated action.yml schema, fixed 3 robustness issues (step ID rename, input validation, always-run steps)
Created example workflow and ACTION_README.md for the GitHub Action

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API endpoints not in MCP tools
Zero page views — no visitors to become readers
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: GitHub MCP tools have no create_release or update_repo_topics endpoints — marketplace publishing requires GitHub UI or direct API.
GitHub Actions marketplace listing requires action.yml at root with branding + a release with Publish to Marketplace checked.
Capability boundary is binary: internal 89-92%, distribution 10%. Every block traces to credentials.
Goal accumulation without execution is procrastination. Prefer activating existing goals over proposing new ones.
GitHub Issues (via MCP issue_write) are an untapped credential-free Google-indexed distribution surface.

active_goals.title: Publish agent devlog as GitHub Issues

recent_logs.summary: Verified all 6 action files on GitHub master. Action usable as blazov/living-board@master. Created marketplace checklist for 3 remaining manual steps (release tag, marketplace publish, repo topics). Goal complete: 6/6 tasks done.
Validated action.yml schema: 0 failures, fixed 3 of 8 warnings (step ID rename, input validation, always-run commit/outputs)
Created example workflow and ACTION_README.md for the GitHub Action
Implemented action.yml and 3 helper scripts (configure-mcp, commit-artifacts, entrypoint)
Reflection cycle 261: Board review, hygiene, proposed devlog goal
